sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41264" key="e)pita/xusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτᾰ´χ-ῡσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n41264.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hurrying on,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diotog.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.7.62</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
